name: Shchi
instructions:
1. Shred the cabbage into thin strips. Peel and dice the potatoes, and finely chop the carrots and onion.

2. Heat sunflower oil in a large pot over medium heat. Sauté the onion for 3 minutes, then add the carrots and cook for 3 more minutes.

3. Add the cabbage and stir well. Cook for 5 minutes until slightly softened.

4. Pour in the vegetable broth, add the potatoes and bay leaf. Bring to a boil.

5. Reduce heat and simmer for 20-25 minutes until the vegetables are tender.

6. Season with salt and pepper and extra bay leaf to taste.

7. Serve hot with sour cream and rye bread.
simpleInstructions:
1. Shred cabbage, dice potatoes and carrots, chop onion.

2. Sauté onion and carrots.

3. Add cabbage and cook 5 minutes.

4. Pour in broth, add potatoes and bay leaf. Boil.

5. Simmer 20-25 minutes.

6. Season with salt and pepper.

7. Serve with sour cream and rye bread.
